firmware.title: Get Android 15 now. More productive, protective, and intuitive.
firmware.description:
Hello, Android 15
Your devices, made to work for you.

Your device will update to Android 15. Learn more at android.com/15.

New features include:
- Private space allows you to keep sensitive apps and data out of sight
- Theft protection locks down your device when stolen
- Better multitasking on tablets and foldables
- Archive apps to save space while preserving your data
- Improved navigation with a new back gesture preview

Downloading updates over a mobile network or while roaming may cause additional charges.

firmware.title: Android 16
firmware.description:
This update fixes critical bugs and improves the performance and stability of your device. Learn more at g.co/pixel/community.

Downloading updates over a mobile network or while roaming may cause additional charges.

firmware.title: March Pixel Drop update available
firmware.description:
Your Pixel is getting even better... Discover the latest enhancements and new features with this Pixel update, designed to make your device more helpful.

Learn more at our Community page.

What's new?

  • Use Circle to Search to find the look[1, 2], select your favorite item, and virtually try it on.[2]
  • The Now Playing app keeps track of the music playing around you and adds it to your history.[3]
  • Magic Cue suggests restaurant options based on your conversation in a window right over your chat, so you never have to switch apps. [4]
  • See real-time transit info and delay alerts, live sports scores, and market trends right on your lock screen.[5,6,7]
  • Get an instant alert on your Pixel Watch if you leave your phone behind, and enjoy peace of mind knowing it will lock automatically if you walk out of range.[8] And with your watch connected to your phone, you can use it for faster identity checks.[9]


[1] Internet connection required. Works on compatible apps, surfaces, and Circle to Search compatible devices. Results may vary depending on visual matches. Available where AI Overviews or AI Mode is available. Not available in France.
[2] Limitations may apply. Google account required, users 18+. Available only in the US, Canada, UK, Japan, Australia, and India. Find the look and Try it on with Circle to Search available only on Pixel 10 phones and newer
[3] Download Now Playing app from the Google Play Store.
[4] Only available for Pixel 10, Pixel 10 Pro, Pixel 10 Pro XL, and Pixel 10 Pro Fold in select countries and languages. Available to users aged 18+.
[5] Real-time transit info on At a Glance available only on Pixel 7 and newer excluding Pixel Tablet. Language restrictions may apply. Available globally except Europe and the UK. Connection to Google account and Google Maps required.
[6] Live sport scores on At a Glance not available on Pixel Tablet. Language restrictions may apply. Requires following your selected sports team on Google.
[7] Market trends on At a Glance not available on Pixel Tablet. Connection to Google Finance platform required.
[8] Available only on Pixel 8 and newer mobile devices & Pixel Watch 2 and newer. Requires Bluetooth connection between Pixel phone and Pixel Watch.
[9] Available only on Pixel 8 Pro and newer excluding Pixel 8 and A-series Pixel devices. Available only on Pixel Watch 3 and Pixel Watch 4. Requires Bluetooth connection between Pixel phone and Pixel Watch.

Downloading updates over a mobile network or while roaming may cause additional charges.
